recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Breast with Vegetables
recipes.description: Juicy grilled chicken breast served with a colorful medley of seasonal vegetables.
steps: Preheat grill to medium-high heat (400F/200C).
Season chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and minced garlic.
Brush vegetables with 1 tbsp olive oil and season lightly.
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until internal temperature reaches 165F (74C).
Grill vegetables for 3-4 minutes per side until tender and slightly charred.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve chicken sliced over the grilled vegetables.

recipes.title: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
recipes.description: A nourishing bowl packed with quinoa, roasted chickpeas, avocado, and fresh greens.
steps: Cook quinoa according to package directions (about 15 minutes). Fluff and cool.
Drain and rinse chickpeas. Toss with olive oil and paprika.
Roast chickpeas at 400F (200C) for 20 minutes until crispy.
Whisk tahini with lemon juice and 2 tbsp water for dressing.
Divide spinach between two bowls.
Top with quinoa, roasted chickpeas, sliced avocado, halved tomatoes, and diced cucumber.
Drizzle with tahini dressing and serve.

recipes.title: Salmon with Asparagus and Lemon
recipes.description: Pan-seared salmon fillets with tender asparagus and a bright lemon butter sauce.
steps: Pat salmon fillets dry and season with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tbsp butter in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear salmon skin-side up for 4 minutes, then flip and cook 3 more minutes.
Remove salmon and set aside.
In the same pan, add remaining butter and garlic. Saut for 30 seconds.
Add asparagus and cook for 4-5 minutes until tender-crisp.
Squeeze lemon juice over everything and sprinkle with fresh dill.
Serve salmon over asparagus with lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Overnight Oats with Berries
recipes.description: Creamy overnight oats topped with fresh mixed berries and a drizzle of honey.
steps: In a jar or container, combine oats, milk, yogurt, chia seeds, and vanilla.
Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Cover and refrigerate overnight (at least 6 hours).
In the morning, stir the oats and add a splash of milk if needed.
Top with fresh berries and drizzle with honey.
Enjoy cold or warmed up.

recipes.title: Turkey and Avocado Wrap
recipes.description: A satisfying whole wheat wrap filled with lean turkey, creamy avocado, and crisp vegetables.
steps: Lay the tortilla flat on a clean surface.
Spread mustard evenly across the center of the tortilla.
Layer lettuce, turkey slices, tomato, red onion, and avocado.
Fold in the sides of the tortilla, then roll tightly from the bottom.
Cut in half diagonally and serve immediately, or wrap for later.

recipes.title: Veggie Stir Fry with Tofu
recipes.description: A vibrant stir fry loaded with crisp vegetables and crispy tofu in a savory ginger-soy sauce.
steps: Press tofu for 15 minutes to remove excess moisture, then cube.
Toss tofu cubes with cornstarch until lightly coated.
Heat sesame oil in a wok over high heat. Fry tofu until golden on all sides, about 8 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add ginger and garlic to the wok, stir fry for 30 seconds.
Add broccoli, carrots, and bell peppers. Stir fry for 4-5 minutes.
Add snap peas and soy sauce. Cook for 2 more minutes.
Return tofu to the wok and toss everything together.
Serve over cooked brown rice.

recipes.title: Greek Yogurt Parfait
recipes.description: Layers of creamy Greek yogurt, crunchy granola, and sweet berries make a perfect breakfast or snack.
steps: In a glass or bowl, add half of the Greek yogurt as the first layer.
Add a layer of half the granola and half the berries.
Repeat with remaining yogurt, granola, and berries.
Drizzle honey over the top.
Sprinkle with sliced almonds.
Serve immediately for best crunch.

recipes.title: Beef Taco Bowl
recipes.description: A deconstructed taco bowl with seasoned ground beef, black beans, corn, and fresh toppings over rice.
steps: Cook rice according to package directions.
Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium heat, breaking it apart.
Drain excess fat, then add taco seasoning and 1/4 cup water. Simmer for 5 minutes.
Drain and rinse black beans. Warm them in a small pot.
Dice avocado and shred lettuce.
Assemble bowls: start with rice, then add beef, beans, corn, lettuce, and cheese.
Top with sour cream, avocado, and a squeeze of lime.

recipes.title: Caprese Salad
recipes.description: A classic Italian salad with fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and fragrant basil drizzled with balsamic glaze.
steps: Slice mozzarella and tomatoes into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
Arrange tomato and mozzarella slices alternately on a serving platter, overlapping slightly.
Tuck fresh basil leaves between the slices.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Let sit for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.

recipes.title: Banana Protein Pancakes
recipes.description: Fluffy protein-packed pancakes made with ripe bananas and whey protein for a perfect post-workout breakfast.
steps: Mash bananas in a bowl until mostly smooth.
Add eggs, protein powder, oats, baking powder, and cinnamon.
Blend with an immersion blender or food processor until smooth batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly grease.
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook 2-3 minutes until bubbles form.
Flip and cook 1-2 more minutes until golden brown.
Serve stacked with a drizzle of maple syrup.

recipes.title: Chicken Caesar Salad
recipes.description: A classic Caesar salad with grilled chicken, crunchy croutons, and homemade Caesar dressing.
steps: Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper. Grill for 6 minutes per side until done.
Let chicken rest 5 minutes, then slice into strips.
Whisk mayonnaise, lemon juice, mustard, worcestershire sauce, minced garlic, and anchovy paste for the dressing.
Chop romaine into bite-sized pieces and place in a large bowl.
Add croutons and half the parmesan.
Drizzle with dressing and toss to coat evenly.
Top with sliced chicken and remaining parmesan. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Shrimp and Broccoli Alfredo
recipes.description: Creamy Alfredo pasta with succulent shrimp and tender broccoli florets.
steps: Cook fettuccine according to package directions. Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining.
Season shrimp with salt and pepper. Saut in 1 tbsp butter for 2-3 minutes per side until pink. Remove and set aside.
Steam broccoli for 3-4 minutes until bright green and tender-crisp.
In the same pan, melt remaining butter and saut garlic for 30 seconds.
Add heavy cream and simmer for 3-4 minutes until slightly thickened.
Stir in parmesan cheese until melted and smooth.
Toss pasta with sauce, add broccoli and shrimp. Add pasta water if needed to loosen sauce.
Serve immediately with extra parmesan.

recipes.title: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
recipes.description: Crispy sourdough topped with smashed avocado, a perfectly poached egg, and everything seasoning.
steps: Toast sourdough slices until golden and crispy.
Halve avocado, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl.
Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Mash with a fork to desired consistency.
Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer. Create a vortex and slide in eggs.
Poach eggs for 3 minutes for a runny yolk.
Spread avocado mash generously onto toast.
Top each toast with a poached egg.
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and everything bagel seasoning. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Lentil and Vegetable Soup
recipes.description: A hearty, warming soup packed with protein-rich lentils and seasonal vegetables.
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Dice onion, carrot, and celery. Add to pot and cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Add minced garlic, cumin, and thyme. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add lentils, diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, and bay leaves.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are tender.
Remove bay leaves. Stir in fresh spinach and cook for 2 more minutes until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot with crusty bread.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Hummus Bowl
recipes.description: A protein-rich bowl with creamy hummus, falafel, and fresh Mediterranean vegetables.
steps: Spread hummus as the base layer in a shallow bowl.
Arrange falafel, diced cucumber, diced tomato, and sliced red onion over the hummus.
Add kalamata olives and crumbled feta cheese.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
Warm pita bread and serve on the side for dipping.
Sprinkle with sumac or za'atar if desired.

recipes.title: Sweet Potato and Black Bean Tacos
recipes.description: Roasted sweet potato and seasoned black beans in warm corn tortillas with fresh toppings.
steps: Preheat oven to 425F (220C). Peel and cube sweet potatoes.
Toss sweet potatoes with 1 tbsp olive oil, cumin, and chili powder.
Roast for 20-25 minutes, stirring halfway, until tender and caramelized.
Warm black beans in a pot with remaining spices.
Warm corn tortillas in a dry skillet or directly over a flame.
Fill each tortilla with roasted sweet potatoes and black beans.
Top with diced red onion, cilantro, sliced avocado, and a squeeze of lime.

recipes.title: Berry Smoothie Bowl
recipes.description: A thick and creamy smoothie bowl loaded with mixed berries and topped with crunchy granola.
steps: Add frozen berries, banana, yogurt, and almond milk to a blender.
Blend on high until thick and creamy. Add more liquid only if needed.
Pour into a bowl.
Arrange granola, fresh berries, chia seeds, and coconut flakes on top.
Drizzle with honey.
Eat with a spoon immediately.

recipes.title: Chicken Fajita Bowls
recipes.description: Sizzling chicken fajita strips with peppers and onions served over cilantro-lime rice.
steps: Cook rice according to package directions. Fluff and stir in lime juice and chopped cilantro.
Slice chicken into thin strips. Slice bell peppers and onions into strips.
Toss chicken with half the fajita seasoning.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over high heat.
Cook chicken for 5-6 minutes until browned and cooked through. Remove from pan.
Add remaining oil to the pan. Saut peppers and onions for 5 minutes until tender-crisp.
Return chicken to the pan and toss everything together.
Serve over cilantro-lime rice with sour cream and salsa.

recipes.title: Tuna Salad Lettuce Wraps
recipes.description: Light and refreshing tuna salad served in crisp lettuce cups for a low-carb lunch option.
steps: Drain tuna well and flake into a bowl.
Finely dice celery and red onion.
Add celery, onion, mayonnaise, mustard, and lemon juice to the tuna.
Season with salt and pepper. Mix well.
Wash and dry lettuce leaves, keeping them whole.
Spoon tuna salad into lettuce cups.
Serve immediately while lettuce is crisp.

recipes.title: Egg Fried Rice
recipes.description: A quick and satisfying fried rice with scrambled eggs, vegetables, and savory soy sauce.
steps: Use day-old cold rice for best results. Break up any clumps.
Beat eggs with a pinch of salt.
Heat 1 tbsp vegetable oil in a wok over high heat.
Scramble eggs quickly, breaking into small pieces. Remove and set aside.
Add remaining oil and garlic to the wok. Stir fry for 30 seconds.
Add peas and carrots. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add rice and toss everything together, breaking up clumps.
Add soy sauce, sesame oil, and white pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Return eggs to the wok and mix in.
Garnish with sliced green onions and serve hot.

recipes.title: Protein Overnight Oats
recipes.description: Overnight oats boosted with protein powder, chia seeds, and almond butter for sustained energy.
steps: In a mason jar, combine oats, protein powder, and chia seeds.
Add almond butter, milk, and cinnamon.
Stir well until all ingredients are fully combined.
Cover and refrigerate overnight (at least 6 hours).
In the morning, stir and add sliced banana on top.
Add a splash of milk if consistency is too thick.
Enjoy cold.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Chicken Wrap
recipes.description: A flavorful wrap with grilled chicken, hummus, feta, and crisp vegetables.
steps: Season chicken with oregano, salt, and pepper.
Grill or pan-sear chicken for 5 minutes per side until cooked through.
Slice chicken into thin strips.
Spread hummus down the center of the tortilla.
Layer spinach, sliced chicken, cucumber, tomato, and red onion.
Sprinkle with crumbled feta cheese.
Drizzle with olive oil, then roll tightly.
Cut in half and serve.

recipes.title: Vegetable Frittata
recipes.description: A baked egg frittata loaded with seasonal vegetables and goat cheese.
steps: Preheat oven to 375F (190C).
Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper.
Dice onion and bell pepper. Halve cherry tomatoes.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Saut onion and bell pepper for 3 minutes until softened.
Add spinach and cook until wilted, about 1 minute.
Pour egg mixture over vegetables. Add cherry tomatoes.
Cook undisturbed for 3-4 minutes until edges set.
Sprinkle goat cheese on top.
Transfer skillet to oven and bake for 15-18 minutes until center is set.
Let cool 5 minutes before slicing and serving.

recipes.title: Thai Green Curry
recipes.description: A fragrant and creamy Thai green curry with chicken, vegetables, and coconut milk.
steps: Cook jasmine rice according to package directions.
Cut chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces.
Spoon thick coconut cream from the top of one can into a wok over medium heat.
Add green curry paste and fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add chicken pieces and cook for 3-4 minutes until sealed.
Add remaining coconut milk and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add bamboo shoots and bell peppers. Cook for 5 more minutes.
Season with fish sauce, brown sugar, and lime juice.
Stir in Thai basil leaves just before serving.
Serve hot over jasmine rice with lime wedges.

recipes.title: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.description: Creamy Italian risotto with mixed mushrooms, white wine, and parmesan cheese.
steps: Warm vegetable broth in a pot and keep on low heat.
Clean and slice mushrooms. Dice onion and mince garlic.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large pan. Saut mushrooms until golden, about 8 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, melt 1 tbsp butter with remaining oil. Saut onion for 3 minutes.
Add garlic and rice. Toast rice for 2 minutes until edges are translucent.
Add white wine and stir until absorbed.
Add warm broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly and waiting until each addition is absorbed.
Continue for 18-20 minutes until rice is creamy and al dente.
Stir in remaining butter, parmesan, and mushrooms.
Season with salt, pepper, and thyme. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Chickpea Curry (Chana Masala)
recipes.description: A hearty Indian chickpea curry in a spiced tomato sauce, perfect with rice or naan.
steps: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Dice onion finely. Cook for 5 minutes until golden.
Add minced garlic and ginger. Cook for 1 minute.
Add garam masala, cumin, and turmeric. Stir for 30 seconds.
Add diced tomatoes and chickpeas with their liquid. Stir well.
Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add spinach and stir until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add lemon juice and season with salt.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with rice or naan.

recipes.title: Cobb Salad
recipes.description: A classic American salad with chicken, bacon, egg, avocado, and blue cheese on mixed greens.
steps: Cook bacon until crispy. Drain on paper towels and crumble.
Hard boil eggs for 10 minutes. Cool, peel, and quarter.
Season and grill chicken breast. Slice into strips.
Halve cherry tomatoes and dice avocado.
Whisk red wine vinegar, olive oil, mustard, salt, and pepper for dressing.
Arrange mixed greens on a large platter or two plates.
Arrange chicken, bacon, eggs, avocado, tomatoes, and blue cheese in rows over greens.
Drizzle with dressing and serve.

recipes.title: Acai Bowl
recipes.description: A refreshing Brazilian acai bowl topped with granola, banana, and coconut flakes.
steps: Run frozen acai pack under warm water for 10 seconds. Break into pieces.
Add acai, half the banana, frozen blueberries, and almond milk to a blender.
Blend on low, using tamper if needed, until thick and smooth.
Pour into a bowl.
Slice remaining banana and arrange on top.
Add granola, coconut flakes, and chia seeds.
Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Stuffed Bell Peppers
recipes.description: Colorful bell peppers stuffed with seasoned ground turkey, rice, and melted cheese.
steps: Preheat oven to 375F (190C).
Cut tops off bell peppers and remove seeds. Place in a baking dish.
Heat olive oil in a skillet. Dice onion and mince garlic.
Cook onion for 3 minutes, add garlic and cook 1 minute.
Add ground turkey. Cook until browned, breaking it apart.
Add diced tomatoes, cooked rice, italian seasoning, and salt. Mix well.
Stuff each pepper with the turkey mixture.
Top each pepper with shredded mozzarella.
Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and bake 10 more minutes until cheese is bubbly and golden.

recipes.title: Poke Bowl
recipes.description: A Hawaiian-inspired poke bowl with fresh tuna, sushi rice, and vibrant toppings.
steps: Cook sushi rice according to package directions. Season with rice vinegar while warm.
Dice tuna into 1/2-inch cubes.
Toss tuna with soy sauce, sesame oil, and half the sesame seeds. Let marinate for 10 minutes.
Slice cucumber and avocado. Shell edamame if needed.
Divide rice between two bowls.
Arrange marinated tuna, cucumber, avocado, and edamame over rice.
Cut nori into thin strips and sprinkle over the bowl.
Garnish with remaining sesame seeds and serve.

recipes.title: Spinach and Feta Omelette
recipes.description: A fluffy three-egg omelette filled with wilted spinach, crumbled feta, and fresh herbs.
steps: Whisk eggs with salt, pepper, and dill until well combined.
Heat butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add spinach and cook for 1 minute until wilted. Remove and set aside.
Pour eggs into the skillet. Let set for 30 seconds.
Use a spatula to gently lift edges, tilting pan to let uncooked egg flow underneath.
When mostly set but still slightly runny on top, add spinach and crumbled feta to one half.
Fold omelette in half. Cook 1 more minute.
Slide onto plate and serve immediately.

recipes.title: BBQ Chicken Pizza
recipes.description: A homemade pizza with BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, red onion, and cilantro on a crispy crust.
steps: Preheat oven to 475F (245C). Place a pizza stone or baking sheet inside.
Cook chicken breast and shred with two forks.
Stretch pizza dough into a 12-inch round on parchment paper.
Brush dough lightly with olive oil.
Spread BBQ sauce evenly over the dough.
Top with shredded mozzarella, then chicken and thinly sliced red onion.
Slide pizza onto the preheated stone or baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
Top with fresh cilantro, slice, and serve.

recipes.title: Sushi Rolls (California Roll)
recipes.description: Homemade California rolls with imitation crab, avocado, and cucumber.
steps: Cook sushi rice. Mix with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt while warm. Cool to room temperature.
Lay a bamboo sushi mat on a clean surface. Place a sheet of nori on top.
Wet hands and spread a thin layer of rice over the nori, leaving a 1-inch border at the top.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the rice.
Flip the nori so rice is facing down on the mat.
Arrange crab sticks, avocado slices, and cucumber strips in a line across the center.
Roll tightly using the bamboo mat, pressing firmly.
Seal the edge with a bit of water.
Let rest seam-side down for 2 minutes, then slice into 8 pieces with a wet knife.
Serve with soy sauce and wasabi.

recipes.title: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.description: A comforting homemade chicken noodle soup with tender vegetables and egg noodles.
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Dice onion, carrot, and celery. Add to pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Add chicken broth, thyme, and bay leaves. Bring to a boil.
Add chicken breast and reduce to a simmer. Cook for 15 minutes until chicken is done.
Remove chicken, shred with two forks, and return to pot.
Add egg noodles and cook for 8-10 minutes until tender.
Remove bay leaves. Season with salt and pepper.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.

recipes.title: Breakfast Burrito
recipes.description: A hearty breakfast burrito with scrambled eggs, sausage, cheese, and potatoes.
steps: Cook hash browns in a skillet over medium heat until crispy, about 8 minutes.
Cook sausage links according to package directions. Slice into rounds.
Whisk eggs with salt. Melt butter in a pan and scramble eggs until soft curds form.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet or microwave for 15 seconds.
Layer scrambled eggs, hash browns, sausage, cheese, and salsa in the center of each tortilla.
Fold in sides and roll tightly.
Optional: grill seam-side down for 2 minutes to seal.
Serve warm with extra salsa.

recipes.title: Pad Thai
recipes.description: Classic Thai stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, peanuts, and tangy tamarind sauce.
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes until flexible. Drain.
Mix fish sauce, tamarind paste, and palm sugar for the sauce. Set aside.
Cube tofu. Season shrimp with a pinch of salt.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Fry tofu until golden, about 5 minutes. Remove.
Add shrimp to wok. Cook 2 minutes per side until pink. Remove.
Push everything to one side. Crack eggs into the wok and scramble.
Add drained noodles and sauce. Toss everything together for 2 minutes.
Add bean sprouts and sliced scallions. Toss for 30 seconds.
Return shrimp and tofu to the wok. Toss to combine.
Serve immediately topped with crushed peanuts and lime wedges.

recipes.title: Greek Salad
recipes.description: A refreshing Greek salad with crisp cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and blocks of creamy feta.
steps: Cut cucumber into thick half-moons.
Cut tomatoes into wedges.
Thinly slice red onion.
Cut bell pepper into rings.
In a large bowl, combine cucumber, tomatoes, onion, pepper, and olives.
Cut feta into large cubes and add to the salad.
Whisk olive oil, red wine vinegar, oregano, and salt for dressing.
Pour dressing over salad and gently toss.
Let sit for 5 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.

recipes.title: Protein Energy Balls
recipes.description: No-bake protein balls with oats, peanut butter, and chocolate chips for a quick snack.
steps: In a large bowl, combine oats, protein powder, and chia seeds.
Add peanut butter, honey, and vanilla extract.
Stir until well combined. If mixture is too dry, add a splash of milk.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Refrigerate mixture for 20 minutes to firm up.
Roll into 12 equal-sized balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
Can also be frozen for up to 3 months.

recipes.title: Baked Oatmeal
recipes.description: Warm baked oatmeal with apples, cinnamon, and walnuts for a cozy breakfast.
steps: Preheat oven to 375F (190C). Grease a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Dice apples into small cubes.
In a bowl, mix oats, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
In another bowl, whisk milk, eggs, maple syrup, and vanilla.
Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients and stir to combine.
Fold in diced apples and half the walnuts.
Pour into prepared baking dish.
Top with remaining walnuts.
Bake for 35-40 minutes until golden and set in the center.
Let cool 10 minutes. Serve warm with extra maple syrup if desired.

recipes.title: Grilled Steak with Chimichurri
recipes.description: Perfectly grilled flank steak topped with vibrant Argentine chimichurri sauce.
steps: Season flank steak generously with salt and pepper. Let sit at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Finely chop parsley and cilantro. Mince garlic.
Make chimichurri: combine herbs, garlic, vinegar, olive oil, red pepper flakes, and oregano. Season with salt.
Preheat grill to high heat (450F/230C).
Grill steak for 4-5 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Transfer to a cutting board and let rest for 10 minutes.
Slice steak thinly against the grain.
Serve topped with generous spoonfuls of chimichurri sauce.

recipes.title: Cottage Cheese Bowl
recipes.description: A protein-rich cottage cheese bowl topped with fresh fruit, nuts, and a drizzle of honey.
steps: Spoon cottage cheese into a bowl.
Top with diced pineapple and sliced strawberries.
Sprinkle with chopped walnuts and chia seeds.
Drizzle honey over the top.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Chicken Shawarma Bowl
recipes.description: Middle Eastern spiced chicken served over turmeric rice with tahini sauce and pickled vegetables.
steps: Mix cumin, coriander, turmeric, paprika, cinnamon, 2 tbsp olive oil, and half the garlic for marinade.
Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and toss with marinade. Let sit for 15 minutes.
Cook basmati rice with a pinch of turmeric.
Grill or pan-sear chicken for 6-8 minutes until fully cooked and slightly charred.
Make tahini sauce: whisk tahini with lemon juice, remaining garlic, and 3 tbsp water.
Dice cucumber and halve cherry tomatoes.
Divide rice among bowls. Top with chicken, cucumber, and tomatoes.
Drizzle generously with tahini sauce.

recipes.title: Roasted Vegetable Pasta
recipes.description: Pasta tossed with oven-roasted seasonal vegetables, garlic, and parmesan.
steps: Preheat oven to 425F (220C).
Cut zucchini, bell peppers, and onion into 1-inch chunks. Halve cherry tomatoes.
Toss vegetables with olive oil, balsamic vinegar, dried basil, salt, and pepper.
Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, stirring once halfway.
Cook penne according to package directions. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.
Drain pasta and return to pot.
Add roasted vegetables, minced garlic, and parmesan to the pasta.
Toss together, adding pasta water as needed to create a light sauce.
Serve immediately with extra parmesan.

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie
recipes.description: A creamy, protein-packed smoothie with peanut butter, banana, and oats.
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender in the order listed.
Blend on high for 60 seconds until completely smooth.
If too thick, add a splash more milk and blend again.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Shrimp Tacos
recipes.description: Zesty shrimp tacos with cabbage slaw, avocado crema, and fresh lime.
steps: Shred cabbage finely. Make slaw with lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Blend avocado, sour cream, lime juice, and a pinch of salt for crema.
Pat shrimp dry. Toss with chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, and salt.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over high heat.
Cook shrimp for 2 minutes per side until pink and slightly charred.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet.
Assemble tacos: tortilla, slaw, shrimp, drizzle of avocado crema, cilantro.
Serve immediately with lime wedges.

recipes.title: Apple Cinnamon Overnight Oats
recipes.description: Fall-inspired overnight oats with diced apples, cinnamon, and pecans.
steps: Dice apple into small cubes.
In a jar, combine oats, milk, yogurt, cinnamon, maple syrup, and vanilla.
Stir in diced apple.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
In the morning, stir and add a splash of milk if too thick.
Top with chopped pecans and an extra sprinkle of cinnamon.
Enjoy cold or warmed in the microwave.

recipes.title: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
recipes.description: Glazed teriyaki salmon over steamed rice with edamame and pickled ginger.
steps: Cook jasmine rice according to package directions.
Cook edamame according to package directions.
Pat salmon fillets dry. Brush with sesame oil.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Sear salmon skin-side down for 4 minutes.
Flip, brush with teriyaki sauce, and cook 3 more minutes.
Brush with more teriyaki sauce and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Divide rice between bowls. Top with salmon and edamame.
Garnish with sliced green onion and pickled ginger.

recipes.title: Vegan Burrito Bowl
recipes.description: A satisfying plant-based burrito bowl with cilantro-lime rice, black beans, and guacamole.
steps: Cook rice. Fluff and stir in lime juice and chopped cilantro.
Warm black beans with cumin and chili powder.
Make guacamole: mash avocado with lime juice, diced red onion, and minced jalapeo.
Warm corn kernels.
Divide cilantro-lime rice between two bowls.
Top with black beans, corn, and a generous dollop of guacamole.
Garnish with extra cilantro and a lime wedge.

recipes.title: Chocolate Protein Mug Cake
recipes.description: A quick single-serve chocolate protein mug cake ready in under 2 minutes.
steps: In a microwave-safe mug, whisk together protein powder, cocoa powder, and baking powder.
Add milk, egg, honey, and vanilla. Whisk until smooth batter forms.
Microwave on high for 60-70 seconds. The cake will rise and then settle.
Let cool for 1 minute before eating.
Optional: top with a dollop of greek yogurt or berries.

recipes.title: Zucchini Noodles with Pesto
recipes.description: Light and fresh zucchini noodles tossed with homemade basil pesto and cherry tomatoes.
steps: Spiralize zucchini into noodles using a spiralizer or julienne peeler.
Halve cherry tomatoes.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add zucchini noodles and toss for 2-3 minutes until just tender. Do not overcook.
Remove from heat and toss with pesto.
Add cherry tomatoes and toss gently.
Serve topped with parmesan and toasted pine nuts.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

recipes.title: Rice Paper Spring Rolls
recipes.description: Fresh Vietnamese-style spring rolls with shrimp, herbs, and vermicelli noodles.
steps: Cook shrimp in boiling water for 2-3 minutes until pink. Cool and slice in half lengthwise.
Cook vermicelli noodles according to package. Cool under running water.
Julienne cucumber into thin matchsticks.
Fill a shallow dish with warm water. Dip one rice paper for 10 seconds until pliable.
Lay flat on a damp towel. Place lettuce, noodles, herbs, cucumber, and 3 shrimp halves in a line.
Fold bottom edge over filling, fold in sides, and roll tightly.
Make dipping sauce: mix hoisin sauce, peanut butter, and lime juice with 2 tbsp water.
Serve spring rolls immediately with dipping sauce.

recipes.title: Oatmeal Banana Bread
recipes.description: Moist banana bread made with oats and whole wheat flour for a healthier treat.
steps: Preheat oven to 350F (175C). Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
Mash bananas in a large bowl until smooth.
Whisk in eggs, maple syrup, yogurt, and vanilla.
In a separate bowl, mix flour, oats, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
Fold dry ingredients into wet ingredients until just combined. Do not overmix.
Fold in chopped walnuts.
Pour batter into prepared loaf pan. Smooth the top.
Bake for 50-55 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Cool in pan for 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
